cards.name: 01_classification
cards.title: 01 CMK Board Of Classification
cards.note: The current page is readable but still needs a bounded safe-area check; do not spend patch work here until dossier and gunbarrel are settled.

cards.name: 02_tijayfly_logo
cards.title: 02 TiJayFly Logo
cards.note: Logo framing is not a current blocker; keep as a timing signal only unless later patches disturb it.

cards.name: 03_gunbarrel_entry
cards.title: 03 Gunbarrel Entry Sweep
cards.verdict: Improved: paired circles now match the GE480i family
cards.note: The scaled 640x430 RLE asset fixes the early sweep family; cadence still needs a final human timing check.

cards.name: 04_gunbarrel_bond
cards.title: 04 Gunbarrel With Bond
cards.note: The large extra oval is gone in g1casta1; this should be checked on CRT for cadence, but visually it is now in the GE480i family.

cards.name: 05_title_logo
cards.title: 05 Tomorrow Never Dies Title Logo
cards.verdict: Visible and centered after gunbarrel asset transplant
cards.note: The title logo remains present after the scaled asset transplant and no longer looks like a skipped transition.

cards.name: 06_opening_credits
cards.title: 06 Opening Credits / Cast Models
cards.verdict: Improved by g1castz1, still verify text safe area
cards.note: The z-buffer dimension fix restored full bodies compared with the earlier cropped candidate; keep monitoring right-edge credit text.

cards.name: 07_file_select
cards.title: 07 File Select Dossier
cards.verdict: Mostly acceptable; background origin still a watch item
cards.note: This page no longer has missing labels/icons; only revisit if the wallpaper shift becomes obvious in live navigation.

cards.name: 08_mode_select
cards.title: 08 Single/Multiplayer/Cheats Dossier
cards.verdict: Visually close; cursor route still needs live-input proof
cards.note: The earlier PREVIOUS-tab problem is fixed in this capture; normal-controller cursor/hitbox still needs one live confirmation.

cards.name: 09_mission_select
cards.title: 09 Mission Select Dossier
cards.note: Keep the TND mission count/layout, but align each label to the same film-caption band behavior as GE480i.

cards.name: 10_difficulty
cards.title: 10 Difficulty Dossier
cards.verdict: Visually close; keep unless live input says otherwise
cards.note: The page is usable and high-res-looking; avoid broad changes here while mission labels and gunbarrel remain unresolved.

cards.name: 11_briefing
cards.title: 11 Briefing / Objectives Dossier
cards.note: The forced briefing route produced the rejected strobe behavior, so briefing should be captured through a safer live/manual route before patching.

cards.name: 12_moneypenny
cards.title: 12 Moneypenny Dossier Page
cards.note: This is part of the pre-ingame acceptance set. Do not assume it passes until captured through a non-strobing route.

cards.name: 13_objectives
cards.title: 13 Primary Objectives Dossier Page
cards.note: This page must be checked after a safe briefing/objectives route exists, because the rejected forced route caused strobing.
